description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages build, build_docker_images, push_docker_images, test, and deploy. Add a Windows build job named .build_template that runs PowerShell commands to set strict error handling, add a Windows Defender exclusion, configure Graphviz path, enforce execution policy, and invoke python ci/windows_build.py with platform, configuration and BUILD_SHARED_LIBS variables, runs on the saas-windows-medium-amd64 tag; define .docker_build_template that logs into the registry, pulls the latest $IMAGE, builds a new image with BuildKit using ci/$IMAGE/Dockerfile and pushes it, using docker:29.0.0-cli and docker:29.0.0-dind, retries on runner failures and excludes tags; define .docker_push_template that pulls the built image, tags it as latest, pushes it, runs only on the main branch, shares the same image and service. Instantiate docker_build_fedora41, docker_build_fedora42, docker_build_rocky8, docker_build_rocky9, docker_build_ubuntu-22.04, docker_build_ubuntu-24.04, docker_build_ubuntu-25.04, docker_build_ubuntu-25.10 jobs each setting IMAGE accordingly, and matching docker_push_* jobs that need their build job and also run only on main. Add Linux build jobs like fedora41-build, fedora42-build, etc., that use the built image, run ci/linux-build-job-script.sh, produce package and metrics artifacts, need the corresponding docker_build job and a portable-source job, retry on failures, and run on saas-linux-small-amd64; create cmake variants (fedora41-cmake-build, ...) that export build_system=cmake and several CMAKE_OPTIONS before running the same script, and corresponding test jobs (fedora41-cmake-test, ...) that run ci/test-job-script.sh with junit and metrics artifacts, plus autotools test jobs (fedora41-test, ...) that set build_system=autotools. Finally, add a deployment job that runs only on the main branch of graphviz/graphviz, installs curl and python3 via apk, executes python3 ci/deploy.py, and uploads graphviz-*.json artifacts using the release-cli image.
